CHANGELOG ========= 7.1 --- * Add `DatePoint::getMicrosecond()` and `DatePoint::setMicrosecond()` 6.4 --- * Add `DatePoint`: an immutable DateTime implementation with stricter error handling and return types * Throw `DateMalformedStringException`/`DateInvalidTimeZoneException` when appropriate * Add `$modifier` argument to the `now()` helper 6.3 --- * Add `ClockAwareTrait` to help write time-sensitive classes * Add `Clock` class and `now()` function 6.2 --- * Add the component
